lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Do you wanna meet my pet? His name's Pete. Or has this amulet of humanspeak broken again?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Hey, [player name], come with me if you like fishing! Or has this amulet of humanspeak broken again?

sections.title: When talking to another player's Evil Bob event
After losing interest or in an area where random events are disallowed

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: So you've been captured too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Captured?

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Yes, Evil Bob captured me and stuck me in this prison.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Some of these balloon animals have keys in them, and if you pull the big lever it tells you which shape animal contains the correct key, but I can never find it.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You need to pull the lever to find out which shape animal contains the key, then pop that sort of animal to get the key.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Bring me any keys you get and I'll try them on the doors.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I wan't to leave now.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Oh. Well I guess you can leave but I'll still be stuck here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Don't you remember? This is ScapeRune's prison. Evil Bob caught you and brought you here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What gives him the right to lock me up? I demand to see a lawyer! I know my rights!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Evil Bob doesn't care about people's rights. He's cruel and utterly merciless. He's a cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Some of these balloon animals have keys in them, and if you pull the big lever it tells you which shape animal contains the correct key, but I can never find it.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You need to pull the lever to find out which shape animal contains the key, then pop that sort of animal to get the key.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Bring me any keys you get and I'll try them on the doors.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here? I can't be held captive by a cat!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Some of these balloon animals have keys in them, and if you pull the big lever it tells you which shape animal contains the correct key, but I can never find it.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You need to pull the lever to find out which shape animal contains the key, then pop that sort of animal to get the key.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Bring me any keys you get and I'll try them on the doors.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Come on, we should leave before Evil Bob comes back! You go first; I'll follow along.

sections.title: When trying to use the main door

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Oi! we'll be using the exit that's over here.

sections.title: When attempting to pop a balloon animal before pulling the lever

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You're meant to pull the lever to find out which sort of animal to pop!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Come on, we should leave before Evil Bob comes back! You go first; I'll follow along.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: That's right, pull it. Then remember what kind of animal shape you see. That's the animal that contains the right key.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Come on, we should leave before Evil Bob comes back! You go first; I'll follow along.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Great, now you've got a key! Bring it to me so I can try it on the doors.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Ooh, thanks! I'll see if it's the right one...

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Aww, that was the wrong key! You must have popped the wrong sort of animal. Try the big lever again - it'll tell you which animal to pop.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Hooray, you got the right one! Now pull the lever again and let's get the next portal unlocked!

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: You did it, you got all the keys right! Thank you! You're my friend FOREVER!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's get out of here before that cat notices.

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Hey, bring me that key you've got! I wanna get out of here!

sections.title: When leaving through the unlocked gates

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Thanks a lot for your help! Here, have a present:

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! See you around!

sections.title: When talking to again after leaving through the unlocked gates

lines.speaker: Prison Pete
lines.text: Don't mind me, I was just leaving...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where am I?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: On my island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take me to your leader!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: I am your leader, you are but a slave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am not a slave, I am a free person!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Ah-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!

sections.title: Talking with Evil Bob before giving him the correct raw fishlike thing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me out of here!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: I will never let you go, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Uhm...

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Because I say so! And because I can never have enough servants!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Now catch me some fish, I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What fish, where?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Talk to my other servants, and hurry it up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it all about?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Sit down and I'll tell you. It's a question of servant shortage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: You are a skilled worker. A human like you is worth a great deal as a slave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A slave?? I will have nothing to do with you. Is that clear? Absolutely nothing.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Now be reasonable little human. It's just a matter of time before you will do everything I ask you to. Play along and this can be a very nice place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will not make any deals with you. I'm a human. I will not be pushed, numbered, meowed at, teleported or enslaved. My life is my own.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. You won't hold me.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Won't I?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Let me assure you there's no way out.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Just ask my servants!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is it possible that you're talking?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: How is it possible that you're not meowing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Meowing?? Why would I be meowing?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Most humans do, that's why I'm wearing this amulet of Man speak... but I do try to train my staff in civilised speech.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Ah, but I suppose things are slightly different in your world... what a dreadful place that must be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'm getting a headache...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you do to Bob?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Bob? I am Bob!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Oh, you mean the Bob in your world? Nothing. I am an incarnation of Bob here on ScapeRune.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What, you mean this is... like some kind of mirror land?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Something like that... somewhere in ScapeRune there must be a human servant called [player name].

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: But you work just as well for me! Now get to work, human! Fish for me!

sections.title: Attempting to eat the fishlike thing
Using a fishlike thing on Evil Bob

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: What, are you giving me cooked fish? What am I going to do with that? Uncook it first!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr... Uncook it?

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: You heard me! There's the cold fire, by the trees, now get uncooking!

sections.title: Using a raw fishlike thing on Evil Bob

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: What was this? That was absolutely disgusting!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Don't you know what kind of fish I like? Talk to my other servants for some advice.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Mmm, mmm... that's... mmm... delicious...

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Now, let me take... a little... catnap...

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: ZZZzzz

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Mmm, mmm... that's delicious.

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Now get me another one, you no good human!

sections.title: Using anything else on Evil Bob

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: What am I to do with that? Catch me some fish, puny human!

sections.title: Trying to talk with Evil Bob while he's asleep

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Mew!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Yowl!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Meeeow!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Meeeeow!

lines.speaker: Evil Bob
lines.text: Meeeeowby laaaater…
